overrides.expect: \begin{array}{c c c}\underset {\rightarrow} {\lim} _ {W} H _ {p} (W, W - (A \cap W))&\xrightarrow {\approx}&H _ {p} (M, M - A)\\\Big \downarrow \approx&&\Big \downarrow\\\underset {\rightarrow} {\lim} _ {W} \Gamma_ {c} (A \cap W, \Theta \otimes G)&\xrightarrow {\approx}&\Gamma_ {c} (A, \Theta \otimes G).\end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{c c c}{\underset{\rightarrow}{\lim}}_{W} H_{p}(W, W - (A \cap W))&\xrightarrow{\approx}&H_{p}(M, M - A)\\\Big \downarrow \approx&&\Big \downarrow\\{\underset{\rightarrow}{\lim}}_{W} \Gamma_{c}(A \cap W, \Theta \otimes G)&\xrightarrow{\approx}&\Gamma_{c}(A, \Theta \otimes G).\end{array}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l l} L (f) = \sum (- 1) ^ {i} \operatorname{tr} _ {i} (g _ {*}) & \text {(since g_{*} = f_{*})} \\ = \sum (- 1) ^ {i} \operatorname{tr} _ {i} (g _ {\Delta}) & \text {(by Hopf)} \\ = 0 & \text {(since all terms are 0).} \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l l} L(f) = \sum (- 1)^{i} \operatorname{tr}_{i}(g_{*}) & \text{(since } g_{*} = f_{*} \text{)} \\ = \sum (- 1)^{i} \operatorname{tr}_{i}(g_{\Delta}) & \text{(by Hopf)} \\ = 0 & \text{(since all terms are 0).} \end{array}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l l} [ f ] _ {U} [ g ] _ {V} [ g ^ {\prime} ] _ {V} = [ h k ] _ {U} [ k ^ {- 1} l m ] _ {V} [ m ^ {- 1} l ^ {\prime} ] _ {V} \\ = [ h k ] _ {U} [ k ^ {- 1} l l ^ {\prime} ] _ {V} & \text {(multiplication in \pi_ {1} (V))} \\ = ([ h ] _ {U} [ k ] _ {U}) [ k ^ {- 1} l l ^ {\prime} ] _ {V} \\ = [ h ] _ {U} ([ k ] _ {V} [ k ^ {- 1} l l ^ {\prime} ] _ {V}) & \text {(by amalgamation of [k] \in \pi_ {1} (U \cap V))} \\ = [ h ] _ {U} [ l l ^ {\prime} ] _ {V} & \text {(multiplication in \pi_ {1} (V)).} \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l l} [ f ] _ {U} [ g ] _ {V} [ g ^ {\prime} ] _ {V} = [ h k ] _ {U} [ k ^ {- 1} l m ] _ {V} [ m ^ {- 1} l ^ {\prime} ] _ {V} \\ = [ h k ] _ {U} [ k ^ {- 1} l l ^ {\prime} ] _ {V} & \text {(multiplication in } \pi_ {1} (V) \text {)} \\ = ([ h ] _ {U} [ k ] _ {U}) [ k ^ {- 1} l l ^ {\prime} ] _ {V} \\ = [ h ] _ {U} ([ k ] _ {V} [ k ^ {- 1} l l ^ {\prime} ] _ {V}) & \text {(by amalgamation of [k] } \in \pi_ {1} (U \cap V) \text {)} \\ = [ h ] _ {U} [ l l ^ {\prime} ] _ {V} & \text {(multiplication in } \pi_ {1} (V) \text {).} \end{array}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{r l} \Upsilon \partial \sigma = \Upsilon (\partial (\sigma_ {\Delta} (\iota_ {p}))) & \\ = \Upsilon (\sigma_ {\Delta} (\partial \iota_ {p})) & \text {(since \sigma_ {\Delta} is a chain map)} \\ = \sigma_ {\Delta} (\Upsilon (\partial \iota_ {p})) & \text {(naturality)} \\ = \sigma_ {\Delta} (\partial (\Upsilon \iota_ {p})) & \text {(since \iota_ {p} is affine)} \\ = \partial (\sigma_ {\Delta} (\Upsilon \iota_ {p})) & \text {(since \sigma_ {\Delta} is a chain map)} \\ = \partial (\Upsilon \sigma) & \text {(by definition).} \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{r l} \Upsilon \partial \sigma = \Upsilon (\partial (\sigma_ {\Delta} (\iota_ {p}))) & \\ = \Upsilon (\sigma_ {\Delta} (\partial \iota_ {p})) & \text {(since } \sigma_ {\Delta} \text { is a chain map)} \\ = \sigma_ {\Delta} (\Upsilon (\partial \iota_ {p})) & \text {(naturality)} \\ = \sigma_ {\Delta} (\partial (\Upsilon \iota_ {p})) & \text {(since } \iota_ {p} \text { is affine)} \\ = \partial (\sigma_ {\Delta} (\Upsilon \iota_ {p})) & \text {(since } \sigma_ {\Delta} \text { is a chain map)} \\ = \partial (\Upsilon \sigma) & \text {(by definition).} \end{array}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{r l} i ^ {!} (\beta) & = D _ {W} i _ {*} D _ {N} ^ {- 1} (\beta) \\ & = D _ {W} i _ {*} (i ^ {*} (\alpha) \cap [ N ]) \\ & = D _ {W} (\alpha \cap i _ {*} [ N ]) \quad \text {(by Theorem 5.2)} \\ & = D _ {W} (\alpha \cap (\tau \cap [ W ])) \quad \text {(by definition of \tau)} \\ & = D _ {W} ((\alpha \cup \tau) \cap [ W ]) \quad \text {(by Theorem 5.2)} \\ & = \alpha \cup \tau = \pi^ {*} (\beta) \cup \tau . \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{r l} i ^ {!} (\beta) & = D _ {W} i _ {*} D _ {N} ^ {- 1} (\beta) \\ & = D _ {W} i _ {*} (i ^ {*} (\alpha) \cap [ N ]) \\ & = D _ {W} (\alpha \cap i _ {*} [ N ]) \quad \text {(by Theorem 5.2)} \\ & = D _ {W} (\alpha \cap (\tau \cap [ W ])) \quad \text {(by definition of } \tau \text {)} \\ & = D _ {W} ((\alpha \cup \tau) \cap [ W ]) \quad \text {(by Theorem 5.2)} \\ & = \alpha \cup \tau = \pi^ {*} (\beta) \cup \tau . \end{array}
